label: ELBO & variational objectives

node.label: ELBO & variational objectives
node.definition: A tractable lower bound balances data fit against divergence between approximate and prior distributions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of ELBO & variational objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Variational autoencoders.
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Latent variables & hidden state.

dependencies.rationale: ELBO & variational objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
ELBO & variational objectives uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
ELBO & variational objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
ELBO & variational objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: A tractable lower bound balances data fit against divergence between approximate and prior distributions.
The role of ELBO & variational objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Variational autoencoders.

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Latent variables & hidden state.
ELBO & variational objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
